_meta.derivation: earliest commit per author_login from commits.json; enrich via /commits/{sha} for files/stats

data.author: corot
data.message:
Part of issue #194: Include a bitmask that specifies the available
features in the firmware and/or driver

files.patch:
@@ -1,8 +1,13 @@
-# Contains version info for the kobuki platform.
-# Useful for introspection
+# Contains unique decide id, version info and available features for the kobuki platform.
+# Useful for compatibility checking and introspection
 
 uint16 firmware
 uint16 hardware
 uint32 software
 uint32[] udid
 
+# Bitmask that specifies the available features in the firmware and/or driver
+uint64 features
+
+uint64 SMOOTH_MOVE_START    = 0000000000000001
+uint64 GYROSCOPE_3D_DATA    = 0000000000000002

@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+kobuki_msgs
+===========
\ No newline at end of file

@@ -1 +0,0 @@
-#autogenerated by ROS python message generators
\ No newline at end of file

data.author: bit-pirate
data.message: adds more documentation and config files

@@ -1,12 +1,14 @@
 # Provides a button event
 # This message is generated whenever a button is pressed or released
 
+# state
+uint8 RELEASED = 0
+uint8 PRESSED  = 1
+
+#bumper
 uint8 LEFT = 0
 uint8 CENTER = 1
 uint8 RIGHT = 2
 
-uint8 RELEASED = 0
-uint8 PRESSED  = 1
-
 uint8 state
 uint8 bumper

@@ -1,13 +1,17 @@
 # Provides a cliff sensor event
-# This message is generated whenever the robot approaches or moves away from a cliff
+# This message is generated whenever the robot approaches or moves away from a cliff.
 
+# cliff sensor
 uint8 LEFT   = 0
 uint8 CENTER = 1
 uint8 RIGHT  = 2
 
+# cliff sensor state
 uint8 FLOOR = 0
 uint8 CLIFF = 1
 
-uint8  state
 uint8  sensor
+uint8  state
+
+# distance to floor when cliff was detected
 uint16 bottom
\ No newline at end of file

@@ -1,11 +1,13 @@
 # Provides a wheel drop event
 # This message is generated whenever a wheel is dropped (robot fell or was raised) or raised (normal condition).
 
-uint8 LEFT  = 0
-uint8 RIGHT = 1
-
+#state
 uint8 RAISED  = 0
 uint8 DROPPED = 1
 
+# wheel
+uint8 LEFT  = 0
+uint8 RIGHT = 1
+
 uint8 state
 uint8 wheel

@@ -1,50 +1,77 @@
 # Kobuki Sensor Data Messages
-#
 
-# Buttons bitmasks to decode byte "buttons"
-uint8 Button0 = 1  # 0x02
-uint8 Button1 = 2  # 0x01
-uint8 Button2 = 4  # 0x04
 
-# Byte "charger" format:
-# - first four bits distinguish between adapter or docking base charging
-uint8 ADAPTER     = 16 # bitmask 0x10
-# - last 4 bits specified the charging status
-uint8 DISCHARGING = 0
-uint8 CHARGED     = 2
-uint8 CHARGING    = 6
+###### CONSTANTS ######
+# Bumper states
+uint8 BUMPER_RIGHT  = 1
+uint8 BUMPER_CENTRE = 2
+uint8 BUMPER_LEFT   = 4
 
+# Wheel drop sensor states
+uint8 WHEEL_DROP_RIGHT = 1
+uint8 WHEEL_DROP_LEFT  = 2
+
+# Cliff sensor states
+uint8 CLIFF_RIGHT  = 1
+uint8 CLIFF_CENTRE = 2
+uint8 CLIFF_LEFT   = 4
+
+# Button states
+uint8 BUTTON0 = 1
+uint8 BUTTON1 = 2
+uint8 BUTTON2 = 4
+
+# Charger state is a combination of charging device (adapter, docking station) 
+# and state (charging, charged, discharging):
+uint8 DISCHARGING      = 0
+uint8 DOCKING_CHARGED  = 2
+uint8 DOCKING_CHARGING = 6
+uint8 ADAPTER_CHARGED  = 18
+uint8 ADAPTER_CHARGING = 22
+
+# Over current states
+uint8 OVER_CURRENT_LEFT_WHEEL  = 1
+uint8 OVER_CURRENT_RIGHT_WHEEL = 2
+uint8 OVER_CURRENT_BOTH_WHEELS = 3
+
+# Digital input states
+uint8 DIGITAL_INPUT0 = 1
+uint8 DIGITAL_INPUT1 = 2
+uint8 DIGITAL_INPUT2 = 4
+uint8 DIGITAL_INPUT3 = 8
+
+###### MESSAGE ######
 
 Header header
 
 ###################
 # Core Packet
 ###################
-uint16 time_stamp
-uint8  bumper
-uint8  wheel_drop
-uint8  cliff
-uint16 left_encoder
-uint16 right_encoder
-int8  left_pwm
-int8  right_pwm
-uint8  buttons
-uint8  charger
-uint8  battery
+uint16 time_stamp      # milliseconds starting when turning on Kobuki
+uint8  bumper          # see bumper states
+uint8  wheel_drop      # see wheel drop sensor states 
+uint8  cliff           # see cliff sensor states 
+uint16 left_encoder    # accumulated ticks left wheel starting with turning on Kobuki
+uint16 right_encoder   # accumulated ticks right wheel starting with turning on Kobuki
+int8   left_pwm        # % of applied maximum voltage left wheel: -100 (max. voltage backward) to +100 (max. voltage forward)
+int8   right_pwm       # % of applied maximum voltage right wheel: -100 (max. voltage backward) to +100 (max. voltage forward)
+uint8  buttons         # see button states
+uint8  charger         # see charger states
+uint8  battery         # battery voltage in 0.1V (ex. 16.1V -> 161)
 
 ###################
 # Cliff Packet
 ###################
-uint16[] bottom
+uint16[] bottom        # ADC output of the right, centre, left cliff PSD sensor (0 - 4096, distance measure is non-linear)
 
 ###################
 # Current Packet
 ###################
-uint8[] current
-uint8 over_current
+uint8[] current        # motor current for the left and right motor in 10mA (ex. 12 -> 120mA)
+uint8   over_current   # see over current states
 
 ###################
-# GP Input Packet
+# Input Packet
 ###################
-uint16 digital_input
-uint16[] analog_input
+uint16   digital_input # see digital input states
+uint16[] analog_input  # ADC values for the 4 analog inputs; 0 - 4096: 0.0 - 3.3V
